channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Trump Faces Setback As US House Passes Resolution To End Iran War

media:content.media:description: The Trump administration insists that the war against Iran is already over.

item.description: Iran War: The resolution, adopted with four members of Trump's Republican Party joining Democrats, was largely symbolic, as the US president can veto the measure if it gains Senate approval.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: The resolution, adopted with four members of Trump's Republican Party joining Democrats, was largely symbolic, as the US president can veto the measure if it gains Senate approval.

item.title: SpaceX Aims To Raise Record $75 Billion In Stock Market Debut: Report

media:content.media:description: SpaceX said it will put up for sale 555,555,555 shares at an initial price of $135 each.

item.description: SpaceX, the rocket and satellite company led by billionaire Elon Musk, aims to raise approximately $75 billion in a record initial public offering, the company said in a regulatory filing on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX, the rocket and satellite company led by billionaire Elon Musk, aims to raise approximately $75 billion in a record initial public offering, the company said in a regulatory filing on Wednesday.

item.title: Trump Says Iran Talks Going "Very Well", Could Yield Results This Weekend
item.description: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that talks with Iran could yield results over the coming weekend and are going "very well."
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that talks with Iran could yield results over the coming weekend and are going "very well."

item.title: Trump Says He Will Attend G7 Summit In France
item.description: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday said in a post on Truth Social that he would travel to a Group of Seven leaders' summit in France.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday said in a post on Truth Social that he would travel to a Group of Seven leaders' summit in France.

item.title: Marco Rubio Calls India A Strategic Ally, Hopes For Quad Meeting This Year

media:content.media:description: Rubio described Quad as an important alliance in the Indo-Pacific region.

item.description: In a written statement to the Committee, Rubio listed the US role in preventing a war between India and Pakistan among the "tremendous successes" of the US Department of State.
item.content:encoded: In a written statement to the Committee, Rubio listed the US role in preventing a war between India and Pakistan among the "tremendous successes" of the US Department of State.

item.title: US Envoy's "Incredible Negotiators" Reply To NDTV Question On Trade Deal

media:content.media:description: Sergio Gor said trade negotiations require compromises from both sides

item.description: Responding to NDTV about what makes up the remaining 1 per cent of the deal, US ambassador to India Sergio Gor declined to discuss specifics, saying he did not want to negotiate publicly. However, he suggested that the unresolved matters are relatively limited in scope.
item.content:encoded: Responding to NDTV about what makes up the remaining 1 per cent of the deal, US ambassador to India Sergio Gor declined to discuss specifics, saying he did not want to negotiate publicly. However, he suggested that the unresolved matters are relatively limited in scope.

item.title: 'Brought Shame On Religion': Sikh Man Jailed For Stabbing UK Teen

media:content.media:description: Vickrum Digwa lied to the police about being the victim of a racist attack

item.description: Judge William Mousley of the Southampton Crown Court said that Digwa killed Nowak with a large knife that he kept attached to his belt. Mousley said that Nowak asked the Digwa if he was a "bad man", which led him to feel that he was insulted.
item.content:encoded: Judge William Mousley of the Southampton Crown Court said that Digwa killed Nowak with a large knife that he kept attached to his belt. Mousley said that Nowak asked the Digwa if he was a "bad man", which led him to feel that he was insulted.

item.title: Trump Values India Ties And Friendship With PM Modi: US Envoy Sergio Gor

media:content.media:description: Gor noted that bilateral trade has grown from about $20 billion to nearly $220 billion

item.description: US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor said US companies are increasingly expanding their presence in India and creating jobs. He also stressed the need to build resilient supply chains, warning that excessive dependence on any single segment can create vulnerabilities.
item.content:encoded: US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor said US companies are increasingly expanding their presence in India and creating jobs. He also stressed the need to build resilient supply chains, warning that excessive dependence on any single segment can create vulnerabilities.

item.title: Video: Kuwait Airport Terminal Filled With Smoke After Iranian Drone Strike
item.description: In several clips, fire damage is visible inside sections of the terminal, with ceilings, walls, and glass panels shattered.
item.content:encoded: In several clips, fire damage is visible inside sections of the terminal, with ceilings, walls, and glass panels shattered.

item.title: Passenger Tries To Open Exit Door On Frontier Airlines Flight, MMA Fighter Pins Him Down

media:content.media:description: The suspect will likely face federal charges in the case

item.description: Witnesses told investigators that Reyes repeatedly said he wanted to get off the aircraft and began aggressively trying to open a rear emergency exit door.
item.content:encoded: Witnesses told investigators that Reyes repeatedly said he wanted to get off the aircraft and began aggressively trying to open a rear emergency exit door.

item.title: "I Was A Little Perturbed": Trump Admits Calling Netanyahu "F***ing Crazy"

media:content.media:description: The exchange underscored the shaky ties between two right-wing allies who started the war

item.description: Speaking on a New York Post podcast, US President Donald Trump acknowledged that he called Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu "crazy" and accused him of ingratitude.
item.content:encoded: Speaking on a New York Post podcast, US President Donald Trump acknowledged that he called Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu "crazy" and accused him of ingratitude.

item.title: SpaceX IPO To Make Trump's Wealthy Officials Richer

media:content.media:description: The company is a major government contractor, with $4 billion in federal transactions in fiscal 2025.

item.description: In total, the federal staffers held SpaceX or xAI stock worth at least $9.9 million and as much as $43.8 million, according to the disclosures, which were made last year and list the value of assets in broad ranges.
item.content:encoded: In total, the federal staffers held SpaceX or xAI stock worth at least $9.9 million and as much as $43.8 million, according to the disclosures, which were made last year and list the value of assets in broad ranges.

item.title: Indian Killed In Iranian Attack On Kuwait Airport

media:content.media:description: The strikes hit Terminal One and caused casualties and damage to airport facilities

item.description: Indian National Killed In Iranian Attack On Kuwait Airport
item.content:encoded: Indian National Killed In Iranian Attack On Kuwait Airport

item.title: How Hollywood Legend Martin Scorsese Became An Unlikely AI Ally

media:content.media:description: Martin Scorsese has directed iconic films like Taxi Driver and The Departed

item.description: Hollywood and the creative arts have majorly pushed back on AI and that's why Scorsese partnering with an AI firm may come as a surprise to many.
item.content:encoded: Hollywood and the creative arts have majorly pushed back on AI and that's why Scorsese partnering with an AI firm may come as a surprise to many.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump Has New Plans For How America Deals With China
item.description: China remains the pacing challenge for the US military, but American strategy appears increasingly calibrated to avoid unnecessary escalation
item.content:encoded: China remains the pacing challenge for the US military, but American strategy appears increasingly calibrated to avoid unnecessary escalation

item.title: US-Iran Live Updates: Trump Says 'Would Like To Meet' Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War Live: The US said that it had "successfully defeated" a series of Iranian missile attacks.

item.description: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: Microsoft And Mayo Clinic Team Up To Build Frontier AI Model For Healthcare

media:content.media:description: Healthcare has long been viewed as one of the most promising and challenging applications for AI

item.description: Unlike general-purpose chatbots, the new model is being designed specifically for clinical reasoning, diagnosis support and healthcare decision-making.
item.content:encoded: Unlike general-purpose chatbots, the new model is being designed specifically for clinical reasoning, diagnosis support and healthcare decision-making.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The China Shock 2.0 May Already Be Here
item.description: According to the IMF, China's total non-financial sector debt has climbed to roughly 313% of GDP and is projected to reach 323% by 2026.
item.content:encoded: According to the IMF, China's total non-financial sector debt has climbed to roughly 313% of GDP and is projected to reach 323% by 2026.

item.title: Abu Dhabi Freezes Rent Hikes Amid Iran War, Big Relief for Indian Expats

media:content.media:description: Under the new rules, all tenancy contract renewals will be processed with a 0 per cent rent increase.

item.description: ADREC has clarified that the rental amount stated in the previous tenancy contract will remain valid for both renewed and newly signed agreements.
item.content:encoded: ADREC has clarified that the rental amount stated in the previous tenancy contract will remain valid for both renewed and newly signed agreements.

item.title: 'Just For Clicks': Indian Americans Dismiss Frisco's Anti-India Propaganda

media:content.media:description: Neha said claims that Indians are taking over the city are unfounded.

item.description: The 22-year-olds, Neha Suratani and Sahaas Kaul, have dismissed invasion claims, saying they are not based on facts and that anti-Indians are doing it for social media.
item.content:encoded: The 22-year-olds, Neha Suratani and Sahaas Kaul, have dismissed invasion claims, saying they are not based on facts and that anti-Indians are doing it for social media.
